title: Ignore
description: The "Ignore" plugin for Minecraft lets players manage their ignore lists, blocking unwanted interactions and messages. It enhances the gaming experience with a customizable and user-friendly approach to player communication.
body:
# Ignore Plugin

## 🌟 Modern, High-Performance Interaction Management
The Ignore plugin is a studio-grade interaction management system for Minecraft servers (1.18.x - 26.1.2). It moves beyond simple chat blocking to provide a robust, database-backed system for managing player relationships with a premium GUI interface.

## 🚀 Key Features
- **SQLite Database Backend**: No more messy YAML files. Reliable, high-speed persistence via `database.db`.
- **Premium Settings GUI**: A beautiful Blue/Cyan themed chest UI for managing per-player settings.
- **Granular Controls**: Independently toggle blocks for:
    - 💬 **Private Messages** (/msg, /tell, etc)
    - 🗣️ **Public Chat** (Symmetric hiding)
    - ⚔️ **Combat & Physical Interactions** (2-Way block)
    - 📍 **Teleport Requests** (/tpa, /tpahere)
    - 🔕 **Mute Notifications** (Silent mode for stealthy ignore)
- **Admin Suite**: Dedicated `/ig admin` tools for staff management and bypass toggles.
- **PlaceholderAPI Support**: Full integration for scoreboards, tablists, and chat formats.
- **Real-Time Sync**: All settings and ignores apply instantly without reloads.

---

## 🛠️ Usage & Commands

### Player Commands
| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/ig add <player>` | Add a player to your ignore list. |
| `/ig remove <player>` | Remove a player from your ignore list. |
| `/ig list` | Show your active ignore list. |
| `/ig settings` | Open the Interactive Settings GUI. |
| `/ig version` | View plugin details and check for updates. |

### Admin Commands
| Command | Description | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/ig admin toggle` | **Toggle Bypass Mode** (Ignore all blocks). | `ignoreplugin.admin` |
| `/ig admin add <P1> <P2>` | Force P1 to ignore P2. | `ignoreplugin.admin` |
| `/ig admin remove <P1> <P2>` | Force P1 to unignore P2. | `ignoreplugin.admin` |
| `/ig admin list <player>` | View another player's ignore list. | `ignoreplugin.admin` |
| `/igreload all` | Reload all configurations. | `ignoreplugin.reload` |

---

## 🧩 PlaceholderAPI
| Placeholder | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `%ignore_count%` | Total players ignored. |
| `%ignore_list%` | Friendly list of ignored player names. |
| `%ignore_setting_chat%` | Status of chat block (Enabled/Disabled). |
| `%ignore_setting_combat%` | Status of combat block. |
| `%ignore_setting_mute%` | Status of notification muting. |
| `%ignore_is_ignoring_<name>%` | Checks if you ignore a specific player (Yes/No). |

---

## 📦 Installation
1.  Ensure you are running **Java 21+**.
2.  Place `ignore-1.0.4.jar` in your `/plugins/` folder.
3.  Restart your server.
4.  (Optional) Install **PlaceholderAPI** for full customization.

---

## 📈 Troubleshooting
For support, please visit our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/krcaTEK5VD).
- Check `config.yml` for default behavior settings.
- Use `/ig admin toggle` if you are an OP and being blocked by ignores while testing.
